collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (39 total Queries, 39 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `transaksi`.*, `barang`.`nama_barang`, `barang`.`satuan`, COALESCE(users.email, "Tidak diketahui") as operator FROM `transaksi` JOIN `barang` ON `barang`.`id` = `transaksi`.`id_barang` LEFT JOIN `users` ON `users`.`id` = `transaksi`.`id_user` WHERE DATE(transaksi.tanggal) >= '2026-04-10' OR DATE(transaksi.created_at) = '2026-04-17' ORDER BY `transaksi`.`id` DESC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `transaksi`.*, `barang`.`nama_barang`, `barang`.`satuan`, COALESCE(users.email, "Tidak diketahui") as operator FROM `transaksi` JOIN `barang` ON `barang`.`id` = `transaksi`.`id_barang` LEFT JOIN `users` ON `users`.`id` = `transaksi`.`id_user` WHERE DATE(transaksi.tanggal) >= '2026-04-10' OR DATE(transaksi.created_at) = '2026-04-17' ORDER BY `transaksi`.`id` DESC
